productDisplayName: Nike Men Blue Aquahype Flip Flops
description: Style Noteflip flops have been in vogue since time immemorial. The nike Aquahype flip flop, true to its name, will add a splash of style to your feet and life, transporting you to a world of absolute comfort and delight. They have a good grip, are comfortable, and can be worn with almost any kind of casual outfits. Product DetailsBroad rubber straps for improved comfort, has a rubber toe separator for a soft feelBlue rubber footbed with square nubs all overBranding on the straps and printed on the footbedSquare patterned grooves on the tough rubber outsoleWarranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount) Material and CareSyntheticWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
